rules.rule_text:
title: Access of Sudoers File Content
id: 0f79c4d2-4e1f-4683-9c36-b5469a665e06
status: test
description: Detects the execution of a text-based file access or inspection utilities
  to read the content of /etc/sudoers in order to potentially list all users that
  have sudo rights.
references:
- https://github.com/sleventyeleven/linuxprivchecker/
author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
date: 2022-06-20
modified: 2025-06-04
tags:
- attack.reconnaissance
- attack.t1592.004
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: linux
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith:
    - /cat
    - /ed
    - /egrep
    - /emacs
    - /fgrep
    - /grep
    - /head
    - /less
    - /more
    - /nano
    - /tail
    CommandLine|contains: ' /etc/sudoers'
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Legitimate administration activities
level: medium
